scripts.check: node --check src/worker.mjs && node --check src/session.mjs && node --check src/attachments.mjs && node --check src/sdk-events.mjs && node --check src/model-provider.mjs && node --check src/runtime/docker-runtime.mjs && node --check src/runtime/workspace-editor.mjs && node --check src/tools/workspace.mjs && node --check src/tools/runtime-workspace.mjs && node --check src/tools/runtime-fallback.mjs && node --check src/tools/view-tool2.mjs && node --check src/tools/sandbox.mjs
scripts.test:events: node -e "import('./src/sdk-events.mjs').then(({SdkEventNormalizer})=>{const n=new SdkEventNormalizer(); const text=n.normalize({type:'raw_model_stream_event',data:{type:'output_text_delta',delta:'ok'}}); const reasoning=n.normalize({type:'raw_model_stream_event',data:{type:'model',event:{type:'response.reasoning_summary_text.delta',delta:'think'}}}); const done=n.normalize({type:'run_item_stream_event',name:'reasoning_item_created',item:{type:'reasoning_item',rawItem:{id:'r1',content:[{text:'summary'}]}}}); if(text[0]?.type!=='assistant.message.delta'||reasoning[0]?.type!=='assistant.reasoning_summary.delta'||done[0]?.payload?.text!=='summary') process.exit(1); console.log('event mapper ok');})"
